caption: A man with glasses and a large, spiky, grey wig sits in a room decorated with framed photos and posters. He is wearing a white collared shirt, a red bow tie, and light-colored suspenders, with black headphones over his wig. A professional microphone is positioned in front of him. Two logos appear on screen: one on the left reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with a microphone icon, and one on the right reads "BOSS TALK 101 A Podcast by...". Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. While he remains seated in the same position, his facial expressions shift slightly and his right hand moves, becoming more blurred in the final frame as he emphasizes a point. The background remains static, showing a wall of pictures and some clothing items on a rack.
